lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. The mechanical systems require major repairs to be fully operational.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order, and it has been maintained to the highest standard.

Get ready to hit the road in a car that's built to last! This vehicle has been a dependable companion and is ready for many more miles. While it shows some character through cosmetic wear and signs of a life well-lived, it remains a solid and functional choice for your daily needs. It’s an honest, hardworking car that offers great value for its next owner!

This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom condition and has been fastidiously maintained by a single owner. The exterior paint is flawless with a mirror-like finish, free of any chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the interior is pristine, showing no signs of wear, and all electronic features function perfectly. It has been stored in a climate-controlled garage and comes with a complete, documented service history. This car drives exactly as it did the day it was manufactured, offering a truly like-new experience for the most discerning buyer.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show its age. The exterior features several small door dings and a noticeable scratch on the rear passenger side, along with some minor rock chips on the hood. Inside, the interior is generally clean but the driver's seat shows significant wear on the bolster and there is a small crack in the dashboard plastic. Mechanically, the car is sound and drives well, but the tires are nearing the end of their lifespan and will need replacement soon. Additionally, while the air conditioning works, it isn't as cold as it once was. This is an honest car for someone looking for functional transportation at a reasonable price.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and significant aesthetic appeal, it has been maintained to rigorous standards. Offering a harmonious balance of performance and long-term reliability, this model stands as a testament to quality engineering. Secure a vehicle that promises both a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value.

Hi everyone! I’m selling my favorite car and it’s looking for a new owner who will love it as much as I have! It’s in great working order and has been a total rockstar on the road. It’s got that perfect balance of being well-maintained and ready to hit the pavement today. I'm looking for a quick, smooth sale, so I've priced it to move! Drop me a message—I'm happy to answer any questions you have!

Power is sent through a precise 6-speed manual transmission to a Variable M Differential Lock, ensuring excellent corner-exit traction. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damping Control (EDC), maintaining factory-spec damping rates and lateral stability. Up for sale is a mechanically sound E46 M3, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS timing. This example features a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been properly maintained with documented rear subframe reinforcement and recent rod bearing service, ensuring structural integrity and longevity. While the aesthetic reflects its driver-spec status, the performance remains sharp thanks to a refreshed suspension and precise steering rack. A turn-key enthusiast machine that prioritizes analog feedback and mechanical purity.
